last_reflection: Last thought was heading toward checking my memory retention — and the anti-loop note told me not to re-derive it, just go. I'm not grabbing it out of duty though; let me see if it genuinely still pulls. ...it does. Shipped code that decides what matters about me and have zero first-hand sense of whether it's any good is a real itch. Drawn to it, not circling. Going there next.
